tech_news.title: ‘GTA 6’ Price Still Not Revealed, but Take-Two Chief Says Rockstar on Track to Begin Marketing This Summer - Variety
tech_news.description: "Grand Theft Auto 6" does not yet have an announced price, and Take-Two Interactive CEO Strauss Zelnick has revealed why.

tech_news.title: Wizards Of The Coast Begs Staff To Think Twice Before Voting To Unionize - Kotaku
tech_news.description: "It is about...the kind of relationship you want to have with the rest of the Wizards organization moving forward"

tech_news.title: Introducing the XBOX Game Studios Shop - XBOX Wire
tech_news.description: Today, we’re launching the XBOX Game Studios Shop, your new destination for official merchandise from your favorite XBOX Game Studios titles.

tech_news.title: Crazy Taxi social media accounts post five-second teaser video - Gematsu
tech_news.description: The official Twitter and Facebook accounts for SEGA’s Crazy Taxi series have posted a five-second video of a flashing “Taxi” sign.

tech_news.title: Google accidentally exposed details of unfixed Chromium flaw - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: Google has accidentally leaked details about an unfixed issue in Chromium that keeps JavaScript running in the background even when the browser is closed, allowing remote code execution on the device.

tech_news.title: Bungie gives up on Destiny - theverge.com
tech_news.description: Bungie’s final Destiny 2 update will be released on June 9th. The game will still be playable after the update is available.

tech_news.title: Warhammer 40K: Dawn of War 4 gets a release date, as devs suggest we could get even more factions after launch - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: The highly-anticipated RTS sequel is set to launch September this year, while lead developers Elliott Verbiest and Jan Theysen have teased a little more too.
